queries.question: What region are women immigrants from?
queries.sql: SELECT  region_name  FROM Immigrants JOIN Regions ON Immigrants.region_of_origin = Regions.region_id WHERE gender  = 'F'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?region_name WHERE {
  ?immigrants a :Immigrants .
  ?regions a :Regions .
  ?immigrants p:hasRegions ?regions .
  ?regions p:region_name ?region_name .
  ?immigrants p:gender ?gender_f .
  FILTER(?gender_f = "F")
}

queries.question: Where does the oldest immigrant come from?
queries.sql: SELECT  country_name  FROM Immigrants JOIN Countries ON Immigrants.country_of_origin = Countries.id ORDER BY age ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?country_name WHERE {
  ?immigrants a :Immigrants .
  ?countries a :Countries .
  ?immigrants p:hasCountries ?countries .
  ?countries p:country_name ?country_name .
  ?immigrants p:age ?age_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?age_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Where does the oldest immigrant come from?
queries.sql: SELECT  country_name, region_name  FROM Immigrants JOIN Countries ON Immigrants.country_of_origin = Countries.id JOIN Regions ON Immigrants.region_of_origin = Regions.region_id  ORDER BY age ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?country_name ?region_name WHERE {
  ?immigrants a :Immigrants .
  ?countries a :Countries .
  ?immigrants p:hasCountries ?countries .
  ?regions a :Regions .
  ?immigrants p:hasRegions ?regions .
  ?countries p:country_name ?country_name .
  ?regions p:region_name ?region_name .
  ?immigrants p:age ?age_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?age_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: What country and region do women immigrants come from?
queries.sql: SELECT  country_name, region_of_origin  FROM Immigrants JOIN Countries ON Immigrants.country_of_origin = Countries.id JOIN Regions ON Immigrants.region_of_origin = Regions.region_id  WHERE gender  = 'F'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?country_name ?region_of_origin WHERE {
  ?immigrants a :Immigrants .
  ?countries a :Countries .
  ?immigrants p:hasCountries ?countries .
  ?regions a :Regions .
  ?immigrants p:hasRegions ?regions .
  ?countries p:country_name ?country_name .
  ?immigrants p:region_of_origin ?region_of_origin .
  ?immigrants p:gender ?gender_f .
  FILTER(?gender_f = "F")
}
